case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. TAUFETEE, LAMONA et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, KEVIN CLARK APPEARING FOR PLTF; LAMONA TAUFETEE APPEARING AS DEFT. IN PRO PER; LAMONA TAUFETEE NOT ABLE TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH JURY INSTRUCTION JURY DEMAND WAS STRICKEN BY THE COURT. CASE PROCEEDED AS A COURT TRIAL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAUFETEE, LAMONA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 129 BLYTHDALE AVE $2,361.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,361.60, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
